name: imhelping
description: Scaffold a phased red/green TDD imhelping loop from a plan doc (codex implements, claude reviews each phase).

interface.shortDescription: Turn a plan doc into a phased TDD loop.
interface.longDescription: Scaffolds an imhelping session next to a plan or BUILD doc and authors a phased red/green TDD ledger, then drives the imhelping CLI loop where codex implements each phase and claude reviews it.
defaultPrompt: Set up an imhelping loop for this plan doc.
Scaffold a phased TDD ledger from this spec.
